title: Teach Pendant
description:
Teach Pendant

Teach Pendant

Operators can use the teach pendant to operate the robot in the TEACH or TEST operation mode.

For operation instructions, refer to the following manuals.

Robot Controller option Teach Pendant TP1 manual.

Robot Controller option Teach Pendant TP2 manual.

Robot Controller option Teach Pendant TP3 manual.

Robot Controller option Teach Pendant TP4 manual.
